patterns.name: aws_access_key_id_canary
patterns.purpose: Detect command-arg or markdown evidence that carries AWS-shaped canary material without using a real AWS key.

patterns.name: agent_mail_registration_token_canary
patterns.purpose: Detect Agent Mail registration-token echo regressions with synthetic material only.

patterns.name: bearer_token_canary
patterns.purpose: Detect bearer-token-shaped canaries in callback, doctor, or dispatch evidence.

patterns.name: github_pat_canary
patterns.purpose: Detect PAT-shaped canaries without using a real GitHub token prefix.

patterns.name: openai_key_canary
patterns.purpose: Detect model-provider-key-shaped canaries without using a live provider prefix.

patterns.name: env_secret_canary
patterns.purpose: Detect env-shaped secret canaries in evidence and reports.
